description: Perform a configuration for a noise floor test on the OpenBCI Cyton board settings in an 8-channel 'SYNTHETIC (CYTON)' session. Configure channels 1, 2, 3, and 4 to 'SHORTED' input type, ensuring channels 5 through 8 remain at 'NORMAL'. Save a screenshot of the hardware settings panel showing these configurations to /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/noise_floor_config.png.
